name: Wafer Wrapped Prawns
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together prawns, green chile, and oyster sauce.
2. Cut filo pastry into 4-inch squares. Place a heaped teaspoon of the prawn filling in the center of each square.
3. Fold the corners of the pastry together to form little bundles. Twist to seal.
4. Place the bundles on a floured serving plate and chill until ready to serve.
To make sauce:
1. In a saucepan, gently heat tomato sauce, chili sauce, 2 tablespoons water, and sesame oil for 3-4 minutes.
2. Serve hot with the prawn bundles cooked in hot oil.
